item.title: 👍💵Lisa Thatcher - Washington State Hospital Association
item.description: Lisa Thatcher signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Hospital Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.description: Saravanan Kasthuri signed up to testify Pro.

item.description: Jane Beyer signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Office of the Insurance Commissioner.

item.title: 👍💵Sean Graham - Washington State Medical Assocation (WSMA)
item.description: Sean Graham signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Medical Assocation (WSMA). They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎💵Christine Brewer - Premera Blue Cross
item.description: Christine Brewer signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Premera Blue Cross. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎💵Marissa Ingalls - Association of Washington Healthcare Plans
item.description: Marissa Ingalls signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Association of Washington Healthcare Plans. They are a registered lobbyist.
